title: Trump ally Orbán concedes defeat after 16 years as Hungary's PM
shortDescription: Viktor Orbán faces a sweeping defeat in Hungary's elections, according to early results. Follow the developments.

title: Trump attends UFC event in Miami
shortDescription: Cheers erupted after President Donald Trump shook hands with Brazilian fighter Paulo Costa following his UFC 327 TKO victory in Miami, Florida.

title: Tucker Carlson calls Trump 'slave' in Iran war as feud escalates
shortDescription: Conservative commentator Tucker Carlson called President Donald Trump a "slave" to Israel, blaming the country for entering the Iran war.

title: Trump says gas prices could be higher or same before midterms
shortDescription: One of the sticking points in the negotiations held in Islamabad has been Iran's stranglehold over the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump says US Navy to blockade Strait of Hormuz
shortDescription: After failed peace negotiations between the United States and Iran, President Trump said the U.S. Navy will start blockading the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump says US Navy to blockade Strait of Hormuz. Live updates
shortDescription: In a post made to social media early April 12, Trump said the U.S. will blockade the shipping route, marking an escalation in the more than six-week-long war.

title: Young Republicans split from older GOP voters on Trump's war with Iran
shortDescription: Even within Trump’s GOP base, cracks are showing when it comes to the Iran conflict. Younger Republicans are much less likely to support the war.

title: Trump: US in 'very deep negotiations with Iran'
shortDescription: President Trump told reporters the U.S. was in "very deep negotiations with Iran" as JD Vance continues to meet with Iranian negotiators in Pakistan.

title: Ruling gives more time for work on Trump's White House ballroom
shortDescription: A federal court of appeals has ruled construction on President Trump's White House ballroom can proceed until at least April 17 amid a legal battle.

title: Trump administration files emergency motion to resume ballroom work
shortDescription: A judge's order to stop construction work on a White House ballroom poses security risks, the Trump administration argued in an emergency motion that seeks to set aside the ruling.

title: Trump Tower is one thing. Trump on US currency is another. Here's why
shortDescription: In business, Donald Trump's penchant for naming products after himself is called branding, but for a sitting US leader, it's something else entirely.

title: Dems urge Swalwell to drop bid for California governor amid sex claims
shortDescription: Several noted Democrats, including Nancy Pelosi and Hakeem Jeffries, urge Eric Swalwell to exit California governor's race after assault claims.

title: Trump's Treasury boss visits NY diner, downplays gas-price surge as 'blip'
shortDescription: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent visited New York to promote Trump's economic policies amid surging gas prices and inflation.

title: Let the gold eagles soar: 250-foot high 'Arc to Trump' design unveiled
shortDescription: The president's latest attempt to remake Washington was just submitted to his handpicked Commission on Fine Arts.

title: Congressman Eliot Engel dead at 79. 'A fierce advocate'
shortDescription: Former Congressman Eliot Engel, staunch Trump opponent and Bronx native who represented Westchester, has died. He was 79.

title: Melania Trump's outfit sends a message. She's a victim, but not Epstein's
shortDescription: The first lady's fashion choices are often highly scrutinized, viewed as symbolic and spark conversation online.
